bridge.liveDesc: Your wallet is synced with the trading terminal — jump to novex.finance and everything carries over.
bridge.onceDesc: Your wallet unlocks both the academy and the full trading terminal — no re-authentication.

dash.heroSub: Novex Academy teaches the exact system that powers our live trading fleet. Master SENSEI's 12 signal dimensions, understand fleet consensus, and graduate into Chief Investment Officer (CIO) chip.

academy.title: Academy
academy.sub: 5 modules. 19 lessons. Built around the live trading system.

vault.title: Personal Command Center
vault.sub: Your stats, your PnL, your NXP, your identity — all in one place.

edit.title: Edit your profile
edit.sub: Shows up in leaderboards, terminal, and your vault.
edit.name: Display name
edit.nameHint: Max 20 chars. Shown on the leaderboard.
edit.bioPh: One line about how you trade

lb.title: Leaderboard
lb.sub: Live rankings from the Novex fleet. Updated every 5 minutes.

wallet.title: Connect a wallet
wallet.sub: One connection. Works across Academy and Terminal.
